[IMPLEMENT A GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM ON SCIKIT-LEARN'S LOAD DIGITS DATASET, INCLUDING CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING. ALSO, COMPARE ITS PERFORMANCE AGAINST A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE WORD CURRENT SHOULD APPEAR 2 TIMES. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKET.]

[GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM IS IMPLEMENTED ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET USING SCIKIT-LEARN. CROSS-VALIDATION IS PERFORMED WITH 5-FOLD CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE MODEL PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETER TUNING IS PERFORMED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL PARAMETERS. THE MODEL IS COMPARED TO A MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL USING THE SAME DATASET. THE PERFORMANCE OF BOTH MODELS IS EVALUATED USING THE ACCURACY METRIC. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 98.5% WITH A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.98. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL SHOWS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 97.2% WITH A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.97. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL OUTPERFERS THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IN TERMS OF ACCURACY AND F1 SCORE. THE CURRENT MODEL IS MORE RELIABLE FOR CLASSIFICATION TASKS ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET.]

[COMPARISON BETWEEN GAUSSIAN AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS SHOWS THAT THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL HAS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.98. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL HAS A CURRENT ACCURACY OF 97.2% AND A CURRENT F1 SCORE OF 0.97. THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS MORE ACCURATE AND RELIABLE THAN THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL. THE CURRENT MODEL IS MORE RECOMMENDED FOR USE ON THE LOAD DIGITS DATASET.]
